svg.title: Works council formation - stage, actors, result, protection per phase
svg.desc: Each row is one phase. Columns show the phase, who acts, what is produced, and the legal protection that applies.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 1 - the invitation')
sendPrompt('What is the result of Phase 1?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about §15(3a) KSchG protection for inviters')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 2 - the election assembly')
sendPrompt('What is the result of Phase 2?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about §15(3) KSchG protection for the election committee')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 3 - the election preparation')
sendPrompt('What is the result of Phase 3?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about §15(3) KSchG protection for candidates')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Phase 4 - the council mandate')
sendPrompt('What is the result of Phase 4?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about §15(1) KSchG full dismissal protection')
